title: Hardcore mod
description: Hardcore mode backport from 1.0 to b1.7.3 (with mp support)
body:
# NOTE
This mod was intended to be a replace for [Better World Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-world-options) as it didn't work well on servers.
However since the release 0.3.0 the mod was tweaked to work on servers and so you don't need this mod anymore.
You can use it of course if you want just a lightweight hardcode mode implementation but if you need more configuration over all aspects of your worlds i would highly recommend to use BWO.

# Hardcore mod
Hardcore mode backport from 1.0 to b1.7.3

Complatible with both singleplayer and multiplayer.

![Ingame screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/524ad4d3ec06c82fdd15650b572320fcc62417cc.png)
# Texture pack support
Custom icons are only used for hardcore (non hardcore uses vanilla texture) and should be located at /assets/hardcore/textures/gui/icons.png so you should add 2 textures at those two locations:

`/gui/icons.png` - for non hardcore aka vanilla texture

`/assets/hardcore/textures/gui/icons.png` - hardcore only

Their layout is exactly same.

[The texture used in mod](https://github.com/freehij/hardcore-mod/blob/babric-b1.7.3/src/main/resources/assets/hardcore/textures/gui/icons.png)
